inputs.label: Hole Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the cylindrical hole for the post, typically 3 times the post width.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the cylindrical hole for the post, typically 3 times the post width.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direk için silindirik deliğin çapı, tipik olarak direk genişliğinin 3 katı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser des zylindrischen Lochs für den Pfosten, typischerweise das 3-fache der Pfostenbreite.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre du trou cylindrique pour le poteau, généralement 3 fois la largeur du poteau
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro del agujero cilíndrico para el poste, típicamente 3 veces el ancho del poste.

inputs.label: Hole Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of the hole, usually 1/3 to 1/2 of the above-ground post height.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of the hole, usually 1/3 to 1/2 of the above-ground post height.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deliğin derinliği, genellikle yer üstü direk yüksekliğinin 1/3 ila 1/2'si.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tiefe des Lochs, normalerweise 1/3 bis 1/2 der oberirdischen Pfostenhöhe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur du trou, généralement 1/3 à 1/2 de la hauteur du poteau hors sol
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad del agujero, usualmente 1/3 a 1/2 de la altura del poste sobre el suelo.

inputs.label: Post Side Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of a square post. For round posts, use diameter equivalent.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of a square post. For round posts, use diameter equivalent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kare direğin genişliği. Yuvarlak direkler için eşdeğer çap kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite eines quadratischen Pfostens. Bei runden Pfosten den äquivalenten Durchmesser verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur d'un poteau carré. Pour les poteaux ronds, utiliser le diamètre équivalent
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de un poste cuadrado. Para postes redondos, usar el diámetro equivalente.

inputs.label: Number of Posts
inputs.businessContext: Total number of post holes to be filled.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of post holes to be filled.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de trous de poteau à remplir
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de agujeros para postes a rellenar.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Extra percentage of concrete to order for spillage, over-digging, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra percentage of concrete to order for spillage, over-digging, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dökülme, aşırı kazma vb. için sipariş edilecek ekstra beton yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz an Beton für Verschütten, Überaushub usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire de béton à commander pour les déversements, surcreusements, etc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje extra de concreto a pedir por derrames, sobre-excavación, etc.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
